title: Material
description: Material: Physical material to be used for Takeoffs and asigned to Physical elements. Material is capable of storing discipline specific data in Properties.

Density.description: The density to be used for material takeoffs. Can differ from discipline specific densities assigned on Properties as required for analysis. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

Properties.description: Discipline data related to the material.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
